auto_key_rotation_enabled.description: Specifies whether automatic key rotation is enabled for the disk encryption set. Must be set to `true` or `false`.

encryption_type.description: Specifies the type of encryption to be used for the disk encryption set, such as 'EncryptionAtRestWithPlatformKey' or 'EncryptionAtRestWithCustomerKey'.

federated_client_id.description: Specifies the client ID of the federated identity used for disk encryption set access. Must be associated with the Azure Key Vault's managed identity.

identity.description: Specifies the identity to be used for the disk encryption set, which must be a managed identity capable of accessing the required key vault.

key_vault_key_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Azure Key Vault key to be used for disk encryption. Must be in the format of a valid Azure Key Vault key URI.

managed_hsm_key_id.description: Specifies the Azure Key Vault Managed HSM key ID to be used for encrypting the disk encryption set. Must be a valid key in a Managed HSM.

name.description: Specifies the name of the disk encryption set, which must be unique within the resource group and comply with Azure naming conventions.

tags.description: Mapping of key-value pairs to organize and categorize resources, typically for management, billing, or compliance purposes.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeouts for create, update, and delete operations of the disk encryption set.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
